positions.title: Product manager
positions.description:
1) 'Gift-Funding' Payment Service
📌 Situation: With increasing demand for custom wedding and group gifting promotions, a new payment method was needed to match evolving consumer needs
🔧 Action: Planned a user-friendly “Gift-Funding” system accessible to all age groups. Designed user-centered alerts for funding targets and deadlines to reduce drop-off.
Introduced a dual-order structure (pre-order → main order) for older users, and coordinated directly with PG companies to build policy-based payment logic.
Refined the UI flow between checkout and My Page, and optimized alert timing and messaging to support user navigation.
📈 Result:
• Activated new marketing opportunities with the implementation of the gift-funding model
• Reduced development errors and customer service issues through admin UI and policy design
• Increased product sales by 23% compared to conventional purchase flow

2) Personalized Product Recommendation with Big Data
📌 Situation: No existing personalized recommendation system based on user behavior
🔧 Action: Improved UI/UX for high-traffic pages (main & My Page), implemented separate recommendation logic for members and non-members using cookies and membership tiers.
Built an admin-friendly template allowing flexible display conditions, reducing operational burden.
📈 Result:
• Products with low performance saw 2x higher conversions via sustained exposure
• Purchase conversion rate for non-members increased by 30%

3) Ranking Component Development and Operation
📌 Situation: New products and promotions were released annually, but rankings were built manually each time
🔧 Action: Built a dynamic component reflecting real-time rankings based on 1, 7and 30-day cumulative sales. Developed a backend UI to manage categories, button styles, and tooltip content
📈 Result:
• Saved over 20 man-days of development time compared to hardcoded pages
• Provided real-time data for marketing strategy
• Increased user traffic driven by ranking-based content

positions.title: Promotions Team
positions.description:
✅ The Korea Ssireum Association (KSA) 🤼 is the official sports governing body for the sport of Ssireum in South Korea.
1) Online and Offline Content Planning & Operation 📺📰
▪️ Led quarterly YouTube content and magazine production to promote public awareness of Ssireum (traditional Korean wrestling)
▪️ Built the foundation for traditional sports to enter digital media and attracted new fan demographics

2) Digital Platform and Social Media Management 💻📱
▪️ Planned and managed the renewal and ongoing operations of the association’s official website
▪️ Operated official social media channels (content planning, scheduling, uploading, and feedback integration)

3) Promotion and Communication Strategy 📣🗞
▪️ Wrote promotional content including tournament articles, event coverage, and athlete interviews
▪️ Executed tailored PR strategies using various channels including press, web, and social media

4) Event Planning and Execution 🎪🤝
▪️ Planned and operated offline events related to Ssireum (e.g., fan meetups, experience programs)
▪️ Oversaw on-site operations in collaboration with athletes and related staff

5) Planning Documentation and Proposal Writing 📝📂
▪️ Curated athlete information and provided materials for potential collaboration with entertainment programs
▪️ Possess strong document-based communication skills, including writing proposals and planning briefs

✅ 大韓摔角協會（KSA）🤼 是在韓國負責管理摔角（씨름）項目的官方體育行政機構。
1）線上與線下內容企劃與營運 📺📰
▪️ 主導以推廣傳統摔角（씨름）🤼 大眾化為目標的季節性 YouTube 內容與雜誌企劃與製作
▪️ 為傳統運動邁向數位媒體鋪設基礎，拓展新興粉絲族群

2）數位平台與社群媒體營運 💻📱
▪️ 負責協會官網改版規劃及日常營運管理
▪️ 營運官方社群媒體帳號（內容企劃、編排、上傳與回饋反映）

3）宣傳與溝通策略規劃 📣🗞
▪️ 撰寫比賽、活動宣傳文章及選手專訪等推廣內容
▪️ 針對目標對象，結合媒體（新聞、網站、社群）執行多元化宣傳策略

4）活動企劃與執行 🎪🤝
▪️ 規劃並執行與摔角相關的實體活動與推廣活動（體驗活動、粉絲見面會等）
▪️ 協調選手與相關人士參與，負責現場總體營運

headline: Product Manager @11번가
summary:
안녕하세요. 측정 가능한 성장을 만드는 Product Manager 박기훈입니다.

PM으로서 저는 제품의 구현을 넘어 비즈니스 가치 창출을 가장 중요하게 생각합니다. 이에 지표 수립, 로그 설계, 대시보드 구축 등 제품의 성과 측정을 위한 분석 업무도 주도적으로 수행하며, 조직의 성장에 기여하는 제품을 만들기 위해 집중합니다.

강한 성장 의지와 목표의식을 바탕으로 다양한 프로젝트를 성공적으로 이끌어왔으며, 스스로 동기를 부여하며 성과를 지속적으로 창출하는 것이 저의 가장 큰 강점입니다.

추천/검색/전시 도메인 PO

1] 숙소/투어티켓 개인화 추천 서비스 런칭
- 개요 : 고객 데이터와 상품 데이터를 수집 및 분석하여, 관심 상품을 추천하는 전시 서비스 및 시스템 구축
- 성과 : 메인 페이지 클릭 고객수 200% 증가, 발생 매출액 13.7% 증가

2] 최근 본 여행 서비스 런칭
- 개요 : 분산돼있던 고객의 탐색 로그 수집/저장 체계를 통합하고, 검색/조회 기록을 타임라인 형태로 제공하는 페이지 개발
- 성과 : 일 평균 CTR 10% 이상, CVR 1.6% 이상 달성

3] 숙소 검색어 자동 완성 Elastic Search 도입
- 개요 : 숙소 검색어 자동 완성 기능의 속도/정확도 향상을 위해 Elastic Search 및 랭킹 모델 도입
- 성과 : 평균 검색 속도 20배 향상, 상위 3개 검색어 클릭 점유율 평균 90% 유지

4] 투어&티켓 검색 추천순 정렬 로직 개편
- 개요 : 전환 성과 기반의 추천순 랭킹 모델 개선 및 프로모션 부스팅 스코어 관리 기능 개편
- 성과 : 검색 유저 수 평균 50% 증가, 클릭 유저 수 평균 79% 증가, 검색을 통한 구매 유저 수 평균 21% 증가

5] 숙소 지도 검색 런칭
- 개요 : 고객이 지도 상에서 시점 이동을 통해 숙소를 검색할 수 있는 지도 검색 서비스 개발
- 성과 : 검색 유저 중 지도 검색 이용률 평균 11% 달성, 지도 검색 관련 VOC 감소

6] 그밖의 업무
- 투어비스 PC 리뉴얼 : 메인/검색/전시 어드민 기획 및 개발
- 전시 템플릿 시스템 기획 : 전시 템플릿 모듈화를 통한 메인 개발 리소스 절감
- 데이터 분석 기반 추천 런칭 : 함께 본 상품, 비슷한 상품, 같이 구매한 상품, 머신러닝 추천
- 검색 및 검색 결과 페이지 UI/UX 개선

positions.title: Product Manager
positions.description:
1] 숏폼 제작 기능 전면 개편
- 개요 : 촬영 편의 기능 추가, 화면 UI/UX 개선 등 영상 제작 기능 전면 개편
- 성과 : 촬영 이탈률 15% 감소, 영상 게시 비율 2배 증가

headline: Marketing Lead | K-Beauty Strategy & PM
summary:
저는 뷰티·소비재 영역에서 제로투원 브랜드를 시장의 ‘선택’으로 만든 브랜드 전략가이자 PM입니다.

국내에서 가장 성과 검증이 냉정한 유통 채널인 '올리브영'을 중심으로, 단순한 마케팅 실행이 아닌 제품 구조–마케팅 메시지–콘텐츠–유통–조직을 하나의 성장 공식으로 설계해왔습니다.

특히 ‘성분’이라는 복잡한 정보를 소비자의 신뢰 언어로 번역하고, 이를 콘텐츠 → 커머스 → 구매 전환 → 브랜드 신뢰로 연결하는 구조를 만드는 데 강점이 있습니다.
이 과정에서 브랜드 포지셔닝 재정의, 핵심 제품 히어로화, 성분 기반 메시지 시스템, 그리고 마케팅·기획·개발 간 협업 구조를 주도했습니다.

저는 브랜드가 왜 선택받고, 그 선택이 어떻게 지속되는지를 제품과 실행 구조 안에서 증명해왔습니다.
앞으로는 브랜드를 ‘운영’하는 역할을 넘어,
브랜드의 다음 단계를 정의하고 더 큰 스케일의 성장을 설계하는 역할로 확장하고자 합니다.

🔹 Core Expertise
• Olive Young Channel Strategy & Execution
• Brand Strategy & Positioning
• Zero-to-One Brand Building
• Growth & Go-To-Market Strategy
• Ingredient-based Product Messaging
• Cross-functional Leadership (PM)

🔹 Open to roles
• Brand Strategy Lead / Brand PM / Growth & Marketing Leadership
• Industries: Beauty, Consumer, Lifestyle
• Focus: Zero-to-One, Scale-up, Strategic Ownership

positions.title: Project Manager
positions.description: At Divii Consulting, I managed projects from inception to completion, bridging the gap between Korean clients, the Indian development team, and Korean designers. I worked closely with clients to define project goals, ensuring alignment with budget and timeline constraints, and translated their requirements into actionable strategies. My responsibilities also included creating wireframes, defining user cases, and thoroughly reviewing all design screens to ensure usability, clarity, and consistency. Collaborating across multicultural teams, I facilitated effective communication, addressing cultural differences to maintain alignment and efficiency. I also strategized feature implementation, rigorously monitored progress, and proactively addressed challenges to deliver high-quality, launch-ready products. This role allowed me to integrate technical, design, and management skills, contributing to impactful digital solutions.

projects.description: As the Project Manager for Samsung C&T's facility booking app, designed for a specific residential complex, I spearheaded a project that involved collaboration with eight different companies, presenting a significant coordination challenge. My key responsibilities included overseeing the project from initiation to completion, managing team operations, and facilitating effective collaboration across all parties. I played an integral role in refining and updating the reservation process flow as well. The app was successfully launched in September 2023 and since its release, the app has achieved remarkable traction, with approximately 130,000 bookings made monthly.
projects.title: Samsung C&T | Facility Booking App

headline: Product Designer
summary:
안녕하세요! 이정은 입니다. :)

저는 AI투자일임 서비스를 운영하는 핀테크 스타트업에서 Product Designer로 시작하여 초기 제품을 구축한 경험이 있어요.

와중에 조금 더 넓은 시야를 갖고 문제 해결 관점에서 깊게 생각해보고자, 현재는 대기업 금융사에서 Product Manager(서비스기획자)로 재직 중에 있습니다.
덕분에 기획과 디자인 모두에 걸친 폭넓은 이해를 갖고 일을 할 수 있게 되었어요.

만나서 반갑습니다!

headline: Business Development Manager @ KKday | Product Sourcing, E-commerce Operations
summary:
Currently serving as Business Development Manager at KKday, they excel in product content planning and business development. Their expertise spans product sourcing, contract negotiation, and supplier relationship management, contributing to the creation of signature travel products and the expansion of inbound travel offerings. While their educational background is not listed, their professional achievements reflect a deep understanding of e-commerce operations and traffic optimization.  

At KKday, they collaborate with partners to negotiate agreements, expand offerings, and strengthen supply chains. Their commitment to enhancing customer retention and driving revenue growth aligns seamlessly with organizational goals. By leveraging data-driven strategies and working closely with cross-functional teams, they continuously improve product quality and customer satisfaction, bringing a fresh, innovative approach to the travel and tourism sector.

positions.title: Business Development Manager
positions.description:
[Product Content Planning & Business Development]

Signature & General Tour Development: Designed and launched in-house “Signature Tours” as well as sourced and developed general inbound travel products through partner negotiations and contracts.

Business Development: Conducted supplier meetings, negotiated terms, and built partnerships to expand product offerings and strengthen the supply chain.

Promotion & Traffic Management: Planned and executed product-specific promotions, analyzed advertising performance, and optimized traffic acquisition to drive sales.

Retention & Growth Contribution: Implemented strategies to improve short-term KPIs (bookings/revenue) and long-term metrics such as repeat visits and customer lifetime value (LTV).

Cross-team Collaboration: Worked closely with marketing, operations, design, and engineering teams to ensure end-to-end execution and seamless communication.

Data-Driven Decision Making: Leveraged user behavior insights and booking data to refine products and inform new content strategies.

positions.title: Global Operation Team
positions.description:
Inbound Tour Development: Designed and operated both private and group inbound tours, covering shuttle, day-trip, and overnight packages.

Government Project Execution: Led government-funded tourism content projects, managing the full cycle of planning, operations, and performance evaluation.

Ski Tour Operations: Managed cost estimation, product design, and operations for ski day trips and multi-day packages, working closely with resort partners and inbound agencies.

Global Exhibition Experience: Represented the company at international travel fairs (B2C & B2B), handling partner negotiations, customer engagement, and sales promotion.

Data-Driven Optimization: Enhanced product quality and sales by running real-time improvement cycles based on booking data and user feedback.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partnered with marketing, operations, and local suppliers to strengthen product competitiveness and achieve revenue growth.

Global Service Management: Directly handled foreign customer bookings and service inquiries, with proven experience in English-based customer support and service process optimization.

positions.title: Product Manager

Oversaw website operations (100+ uploads, pricing, visuals), raising conversions by ~12%.
Handled 500+ monthly EN/JP inquiries.
Led govt-funded Festival tours (2 years), serving 10,000+ travelers.
Organized 10+ influencer FAM tours.
Ran digital campaigns for foreign travelers, boosting engagement.
Represented company at travel fairs (Hong Kong, Singapore), building overseas B2B, B2C ties.
Coordinated itineraries & on-site ops for MICE groups (100+ pax).

positions.description:
- AI 및 AI Agent를 활용하는 온톨 클리닉스 B2B 프로젝트의 0 to 1 진행을 총괄했습니다(월평균 ▲1만 건 결과지 발송, ▲1만 명 방문, ▲40만뷰 달성). 

- 초기 컨셉만 존재했던 제품을 구체화하여 삼성창원병원 및 서울양지병원에 도입했습니다. 제안서 작성부터 구축 및 운영 그리고 개인정보보호 보안점검 정비까지 앞단에서 필요한 업무들을 전방위에 걸쳐 추진했습니다. 

- AI가 업무현장에 어떻게 접목될 수 있는지를 병원에 실제로 필요한 업무백로그 중심으로 작성하고 우선순위를 선정하며 이해관계자와의 조율 속에서 실제 필요기능 중심 최적화가 될 수 있도록 이끌었습니다.

positions.title: Product Owner
positions.description:
로톡(https://lawtalk.co.kr) - "대화하면 해결되는 법"
- 월 50만명이 찾던 서비스(2년 간 유지)에서 월 120만명이 찾는 서비스로의 변화(▲70만명 증가, 3개월 소요)를 주도하고 이뤘습니다. 이를통해 전환 대비 고객획득비용을 1/4 수준으로 낮추는데 기여했습니다.
- 제품에 요구되는 개선사항에 대한 우선순위 설정과 성장 로드맵 및 목표설정, 그리고 스쿼드 리딩 및 기획 실무를 담당했습니다.

로톡뉴스 (https://lawtalknews.co.kr/) - "법, 누구나 쉽게 알 수 있도록"
- 언론매체 로톡뉴스는 우리 사회에서 벌어지는 사건사고를 법의 관점에서 조망하고 중학생도 알기쉽게 이해할 수 있는 기사들을 꾸준히 발행하고 있습니다. 이런 뜻깊은 뉴스팀의 기사가 더 많은 곳에 노출되고 자체 매출을 확보해 자생할 수 있도록하는 성장전략에 힘을 보탰습니다.

모든변호사 (https://everylawyer.co.kr/) - "모 변호사의 성장과 커리어"
- 1년 간 목표로 삼았던 목표지표를 달성(타겟시장 점유율 ▲10% 확보)하며 시장에 니즈가 존재한다는 것을 무사히 검증했습니다.
- 시장에 전달할 가치와 일으킬 변화에 대한 방향성을 찾기 위해 사용자 리서치를 계획하고 우리의 의도와 실제 시장의 Product-market-fit을 찾는 여정을 동료들과 함께했습니다. 서비스 성장에 필요한 제품 로드맵도 함께 고민하고 외주 개발자와 함께 제품과 사용자에게 필요한 기능을 더했습니다.

로톡비즈니스 (https://biz.lawtalk.co.kr/) - "기업 법률문제, 평균 2일안에 3건의 제안"
- 서비스 성장에 필요한 제품 로드맵을 주요관계자와 고민하고, 내부 스쿼드 동료들과 함께 기업과 변호사를 위한 사용자 스토리 전달을 반복(iteration)하며 성과를 추적해보았습니다. 프로젝트 인셉션, 스토리 워크숍 등을 직접 주관했습니다.

positions.title: Product Owner
positions.description:
부모-시터의 채용확정 프로세스 및 결제기능 사전작업에 참여했습니다.

- 사용자 심층 인터뷰(8명) 및 설문조사(182명)를 통해 아이돌봄 시장의 문제 파악을 주도했습니다.
- 부모/시터 각 개인의 임기응변으로 대처하던 시장의 채용 불확실성을 채용확정 기능을 통해 해소하고 이를통해 제품이 시장에 기여하는 바를 지표로 드러내고자 했습니다.

'사업 성과는 어떻게 판단하고, 우선순위는 어떻게 정할 것인가'에 대한 한계에 부딪혀보았고, 사용자 스토리 중심 애자일 방법론을 배우며 짧지만 귀중한 성장의 시간을 보냈습니다.

positions.title: Product Manager
positions.description:
로톡 (https://www.lawtalk.co.kr/) - "의뢰인과 변호사를 더 가까이"
- 매달 1만명 이상의 의뢰인이 찾는 서비스가 월 50만명이 방문하기까지(▲50만명 증가)의 모든 제품 개선 여정에 참여했습니다.
- CPC, 정액제 광고 및 광고시스템 기획, 광고 카드리스트 개선 프로젝트(로톡배지, 변호사쿠폰, 매니저한마디 등)를 주도하여 법률문제를 가진 의뢰인이 더욱 편하고 효과적으로 본인에게 딱 맞는 변호사를 찾도록 하는 일에 기여했습니다.

로톡비즈니스 (https://biz.lawtalk.co.kr/)

headline: SK bioscience Production and manufacturing manager
summary: 3 years of experience in biopharmaceutical filed as an operator and production manager for next generation PCV. Through process optimization, improved batch yield 43% to 80%. Developing the manual resin packing method. Having experience several trouble shooting in both USP and DSP. Having been several PPQ  and validation study such as intermediate hold time study, buffer mixing time study and cleaning validation.
skills: Trouble shooting for fermentation and IEX chromatography

projects.description:
KPI : Setting the test item and acceptance criteria in the fermentation process step for securing the hold time period 0H to 72H
HOW
1. Check the OD instead of bioburden in the fermentation step
Because the purpose of fermentation was to grow the microorganism, it was impossible to check the bioburden level in this step.
Partner company require that it is must to be checked microbial aspect during this process step in any ways. 
OD value has been checked as an IPC during this step, even if that test was not represented live microorganism like an VCD, I figured out it could be used for checking excessive rise and below number of whole organism (both live and dead microorganism)

2. Set acceptance criteria of HPSEC test
HPSEC was the only test item we have but the protein content was too low because it was not proceed any purification step.
All test result was lower than LOQ, it was not acceptable as a quantitive and chemical aspect. However it still could be used for the qualitative and chemical aspect well.
Because the HPSEC test result show the shape of chromatography graph and it can be checked abnormality or split between the batches in the same process step.
projects.title: Validation study - Intermediate step Hold time study

projects.description:
KPI : Batch yield improvement: 43% to 80%
HOW
1. Setting the DO / PH probe condition pre-checked acceptance criteria
Through the oxygen control trouble shooting(PLC module and MFC), figure out that the condition of DO probe have impact on the fermentation control.
Using the air calibration function of the transmitter even if it was not in the fully saturated with the oxygen, the condition of DO probe can be checked before mounting to the fermenter and set the acceptance range.
Using the daily calibration data from the table top pH meter equipment, set the acceptance criteria of pH probe condition

2. Setting the fermentation end time
OD and protein productivity didn’t have any correlation considering the historical data and lab scale study result.
Due to the protease, it is negative impact postpone the process end time even the OD value is getting lower after the max value. 
Oxygen uptake can represent the protein productivity following the lab scale report.
Therefore it can be determined as two aspect OD and oxygen uptake level during the fermentation.

KPI : Resin manual packing method improvement: Success ratio 0% to 100% / asymmetry accuracy 70%
HOW
There was the way to pack the resin mixed manually the resin using the paddle in the company.
Because this way how to settle down was dependent on the water column pressure (just gravity) waiting settling overnight, packing evaluation result could not pass the acceptance criteria.
Instead of mixing the resin manually, close the top adopter and mix the resin using the chromatography system pump, change the flow way from up to down and from down to top, change the flow rate slow to fast and from fast to slow repeatedly.
Through this way, it can save the settle down time and mix the resin more homogeneously rather than the water column pressure way.

headline: Product Manager @ BDACS
summary:
BDACS에서 기관용 디지털 자산 플랫폼을 만드는 프로덕트 매니저로 일하고 있습니다.
규제와 보안이 중요한 환경에서, 신뢰할 수 있는 금융 인프라 제품을 설계하고 실행하는 데 집중하고 있습니다.

이전에는 Roubit에서 자기관리·습관 형성 제품을 만들며, 데이터 기반 설계와 사용자 행동에 대한 이해를 바탕으로 사람들이 꾸준히 목표를 달성할 수 있도록 돕는 제품을 기획했으며, 쿠팡(Coupang)에서는 운영, 데이터 분석, 비즈니스 기획을 경험하며 대규모 서비스 환경에서의 사용자 중심 문제 해결 방식을 익혔습니다.

핀테크 도메인은 새롭지만, 그동안 다양한 제품을 만들며 쌓아온 문제 정의 방식, 데이터 중심 의사결정, 그리고 복잡한 요구사항을 구조화하는 경험을 바탕으로 금융 환경에서도 의미 있는 제품을 만들어가고자 합니다. 

저는 데이터를 통해 문제를 정의하고, 기술과 제품 설계를 통해 신뢰할 수 있는 사용자 경험을 만드는 일을 좋아합니다. Digital Asset · Fintech · B2B Platform · Product Management 영역에서 함께 배우고 성장할 수 있는 연결을 환영합니다.

I’m a Product Manager at BDACS, working on institutional-grade digital asset platforms.
I focus on designing and delivering trusted financial infrastructure products in highly regulated and security-critical environments.

Previously, I worked at Roubit, where I built self-care and habit-forming products based on data-driven design and user behavior insights, helping people stay consistent and achieve long-term goals.
I also gained experience at Coupang, working across operations, data analysis, and business planning in large-scale consumer services, developing a strong foundation in user-centered problem solving.

While fintech is a new domain for me, I bring a proven approach to problem definition, data-informed decision-making, and structuring complex requirements, which I now apply to building meaningful products in the financial space.

I enjoy defining problems through data and creating reliable user experiences through thoughtful product and technical design.
Open to connecting and growing together across Digital Assets, Fintech, B2B Platforms, and Product Management.

positions.title: 제품 매니저
positions.description:
Leading product planning and execution for institutional-grade digital asset platforms.
Focused on building secure, compliant B2B financial infrastructure products, while driving product strategy and delivery through data-driven decision-making.

- Product planning for digital asset custody and platform solutions
- Designing product structures aligned with compliance and security requirements
- Cross-functional collaboration with engineering, security, operations, and business teams
- Analyzing product metrics and iterating through continuous improvement cycles

headline: 신사업/그로스 PM
summary:
✅ 커머스, 풀필먼트, 커뮤니티, 하이퍼로컬 플랫폼, AI 에이전트 분야의 신사업 및 그로스 전문 PM 입니다. 국내외 스타트업 씬에서 주100시간의 밀도 높은 경험과 함께 꾸준히 성장해왔습니다.




💡 강점 및 주요 경험

- 신사업 발굴 및 실행 리더십: 글로벌 환경에서 고객이 겪는 문제를 집요하게 파고들어 신규 프로덕트를 통해 1년 만에 150억 매출을 만들고 1명에서 17명 규모의 팀으로 성장시킨 경험이 있습니다.

- 데이터 기반 의사결정: 수학 전공자로서 signal과 noise를 구별하는 데이터 분석을 통해, 숨어있는 진짜 문제를 찾아내고, 단순하면서도 명확한 목표를 제시하는 PM입니다.

- 독창적인 문제 해결: 진짜 문제를 해결하기 위해, '국내 최초', '홍콩 최초' 수식어가 붙는 original한 아이디어를 실행하고 실험하면서 조직 목표를 크게 뛰어넘는 임팩트를 만들어 낸 사례가 다수 있습니다. 

- 전사 협업 시스템 개선: 조직 특성에 맞는 Agile 협업구조 설계 및 동료에 대한 관심과 성장 지원을 통해, 팀 전체 역량을 끌어올리고 선택과 집중을 위한 협업 효율을 높였습니다.

- 큰 규모 시스템 경험: 150만 / 300만 / 600만 / 2,000만 / 1억 MAU 서비스의 그로스, 기획, 운영 및 매출 2조원 / 18조원 / 85조원 빅테크 기업의 전략과 그로스 컨설팅 경험을 통해 큰 규모에서 협업하는 방법을 배웠습니다.




👤 일하는 방식과 성향

- 유연함과 창의성: 고정관념에 얽매이지 않고 문제를 비틀어보는 비선형 사고를 즐깁니다. 대화를 나눠보면 카리스마보단 유쾌한 에너지와 열린 자세가 더 먼저 느껴지실 겁니다.

- 몰입을 유도하는 리더십: 심리적 안정과 자율성이 공존하는 팀 환경을 만드는데 집중합니다. 각자의 역량과 동기를 존중하며, 그것이 팀의 성과로 자연스럽게 연결되도록 리드합니다.




🎯 추구하는 방향

사람들이 ‘당연하다’고 여기는 비효율 속에서 본질적 문제를 발견하고, 창의적이고 실험적인 방식으로 해결하는 과정에 매력을 느낍니다. 훌륭한 동료들과 함께 더 나은 시스템, 더 나은 세상을 만들고 싶습니다. 새로운 가능성을 탐색하고 계신 분이라면 메시지 주세요.

✉️ LinkedIn 메시지 or yhyungjoo@gmail.com













🧠 [참고] Gallup Top 5 Strengths (검사일자: 2023.09.27)

1st. 전략(Strategic) : 다양한 대안을 빠르게 도출하고, 상황의 패턴을 날카롭게 포착합니다.

2nd. 발상(Ideation): 관련 없어 보이는 현상 사이의 연결고리를 발견하고, 새로운 시각으로 문제에 접근합니다.

3rd. 성취(Achiever): 강한 추진력과 에너지로, 끊임없이 도전하며 생산성과 몰입에 깊은 만족을 느낍니다.

4th. 최상화(Maximizer): 개인과 조직의 강점을 극대화하여 '좋음'보다 '탁월함'을 추구합니다.

5th. 배움(Learner): 항상 더 나아지려는 성장 과정 자체에 큰 즐거움을 느낍니다.




🌍 [참고] Fun-fact

- 학창시절 6년연속 수학부장 역임(?)... 수학 문제 푸는데 미쳐서 3년간 거의매일 하루 1.5~4시간 자며 주로 수학만 공부

- 아이비리그, SKY 출신 50명 중에서 골든벨 우승

- 정책 아이디어 제안으로 세상을 조금 바꿔서 신문에 나옴 (10만명 규모 조직과 지역사회 개선)

- 포브스 선정 'The Most Innovative Company'가 궁금해서 비행기타고 찾아가 엘리베이터 안에서 3시간동안 게릴라 인터뷰

- 50개 도시 문화를 체험하고 Stanford d.school, Tesla factory, Yamato, Z-Innoway 등 글로벌 혁신 기업/사례 탐방 (60개+)

- TechCrunch Disrupt, DreamForce in SF, MWC, Maker Faire, Cal Hacks 등 IT콘퍼런스/해커톤 자비부담 참여 (90회+)

- 미국 12,000km 2회 횡단(4개월), 중국 5,500km 1회 종단(2개월)

- 자신을 시험하기 위해 실리콘밸리에 가서 돈 없이 한달 생존하기 (0원으로 항공 티켓과 현지 숙식 해결)

- 지인을 도와, 국내 스타트업/창업가들을 위한 Beijing 중관촌 탐방프로그램 '한중청년불패' 설계/런칭

- 반포동에서 생활/숙박 공간을 임대하여 멤버십 기반의 아지트 커뮤니티 런칭/실험 (이후 다른 멤버에 의해 사업화)

- 로맨틱코미디 단편영화 제작하여 CGV에서 1회 상영

- 국내최대 IT커뮤니티 (였던) '힙한 서비스들의 비밀' 초창기 순수버전 빌드업&운영지원(8개월), 탈퇴 1년 후 역사속으로...

- 40가지+ 아르바이트 경험 (잡노동, 배달, 청소, 펫시터, 바둑대회 심사, 국공립 수학 방과후교사, 전략컨설팅펌, 제안서 작성 등)

headline: SqueezeBits PM / 🧐 HRI + AI
summary:
I’m Seung-Ryeol Kim, driven by curiosity, keen observation, logical analysis, and creative execution. I’m particularly interested in Zoomorphism and Non-verbal HRI based on Action Models, aspiring to help robots convey warmth in ways that words alone cannot.

Interests
- Deep enthusiasm for cars and robots
- Conducted research on communication between self-driving cars and their surroundings

Experience
- Early Retention System Designer at PUBG (first 2 years), a global gaming company
   - Observed and structured both tangible and intangible user values into retention systems 
   - Planned a profile system (for user identity), event system (for user retention), and the back-office system
- Early team member at Squeezebits, an AI model compression startup
   - Singlehandedly managed PM and design
   - Analyzed AI workflows to create OwLite and Fits on Chips services

Future Directions
- Staying current with AI trends through hands-on experience with LLM-serving frameworks (vLLM, ollama) and  exploring edge deployment for Action Models
- Strong focus on Zoomorphism HRI, envisioning robots that coexist with humans as seamlessly as companion animals have for centuries
- Preparing for the broader adoption of robots by leveraging experience in user systems and back-office planning
- Viewing games as a form of digital twin or metaverse, drawing on philosophy and literature to explore user desires and transform them into structured systems

headline: Digital Designer | AI Content Specialist (KR/EN) | Branding · UX · Content Localization | Interested in AI x Creativity

Multidisciplinary Digital Designer & AI Content Specialist based in Seoul.
I combine visual design expertise with strong analytical skills across AI training, content evaluation, and UX-driven problem-solving. With experience spanning branding, graphic design, UI concepting, copywriting, and multilingual content localization (KR/EN), I create work that is both visually compelling and strategically effective.

I’ve collaborated with early-stage startups, global platforms, and cross-functional teams to design user-centered solutions—ranging from visual identity systems and marketing assets to AI evaluation projects and data-driven content production. My background in architecture strengthens my systems thinking, attention to detail, and ability to break down complex problems into clear, structured outputs.

Currently, I’m exploring opportunities in:
• Digital/Graphic Design
• AI Data Training & Evaluation (LLM/Generative AI)
• Content/SEO Writing & Localization (KR/EN)
• Product/Project Coordination
• UI/UX & Creative Strategy

Driven, adaptable, and globally minded—I thrive in fast-moving environments where creativity meets systems thinking. Always learning, always building.

Built and scaled online tutoring platform during COVID-19, enabling seamless remote learning for 50+ concurrent students.

Conducted initial placement tests and learning diagnostics to match students with optimal materials and strategies, increasing engagement and retention.

Developed step-by-step study plans, milestone tracking, and parental feedback system, leading to a 65% increase in long-term client retention.

Managed all aspects of operations including scheduling, billing, and client communication — effectively running a small EdTech business.

positions.title: Undergraduate Researcher
positions.description:
Conducted comparative analysis of LEED v4 BD+C, SITES, and G-SEED, reviewing 50+ case studies and 36,000+ certification records to identify gaps in urban flood management.

Quantitatively evaluated adoption rates (e.g., LEED credits: Rainwater Mgmt 32%, Heat Island Reduction 64%, Sensitive Land Protection 93%) to highlight structural differences in water management frameworks.

Proposed short- and long-term policy improvements for G-SEED (e.g., item integration, regional weighting), providing practical insights for regulatory reform and sustainable design strategies.

Spearheaded design automation & compliance tools, cutting regulation check time by ~95% and producing 20+ parametric booth prototypes (converted to Python scripts) to bridge design and development.

Drove early market visibility through SEO/keyword research, content campaigns, and client validation (65% response rate), while shaping dual SaaS business models and securing Excellence Awards (Ewha Business Plan Competition, Hult Prize Campus Round).

Designed interactive installations reinterpreting conventional elements (e.g., stairs), attracting 700+ visitors and boosting visibility of student union projects in Seoul’s design community.

positions.title: Project Lead (PM, Concept Development)

Led a 3-member team in a 5-month design-research project, reviewing 5 potential sites and framing the dambi (otter) as an ecological design metaphor for inclusive living.

Directed 10+ Grasshopper simulations on mine-water flow (Taebaek site) and produced 15+ massing studies, applying computational tools to advance the project to the pre-drawing stage.

Compiled a 30+ page proposal reinterpreting underused sites (vacant houses, mines, community centers) into inclusive habitats, emphasizing sustainability and long-term social value.

positions.title: Co-Designer & Project Coordinator
positions.description:
Co-designed an award-winning pavilion reinterpreting Korean lion mask dance and festival emotions into a modern experiential structure.

Optimized material use (pipes, modular elements) under budget constraints, delivering a multi-sensory experience (visual, acoustic, tactile).

Attracted 1,000+ visitors, and project was recognized with an Excellence Award at Seoul City Hall.

positions.title: Co-Founder_Operations & Marketing Lead

Scaled operations from 4 tutors/staff to a structured team, creating onboarding/training manuals, enhancing tutor pay to 2.5x market rate, and improving recruitment & retention.

Achieved 5x customer growth in one year by executing region-based marketing, combining SNS campaigns, direct calls, and offline promotions; boosted sales conversion from 3–4% → 20–23%.

Developed automated reporting & analytics systems (Excel + AI API + Notion), processing 200+ surveys/CRM data to cut reporting workload by 30% and drive 3 major service improvements.

Structured front-desk operations, including consultations, registrations, payments, and automated notifications, while managing key metrics such as attendance and enrollment to maintain service quality.

headline: Product Manager
summary:
I design data-driven systems that scale complex operations and make AI automation viable in real-world products.

I’ve worked across enterprise CX platforms, LLM-based AI products, and commerce discovery systems — focusing on data models, workflow design, and automation-ready architectures rather than isolated features.

positions.title: Product Owner
positions.description:
Enterprise CX/CRM Platform Redesign 

Drove key initiatives to unify fragmented service and VOC/Case structures, strengthen operational consistency, and build automation-ready foundations for the enterprise customer support platform.

Responsibilities
• Owned the consolidation of multi-channel support processes into a unified operational model
• Defined a consistent VOC/Case data model across previously inconsistent systems
• Established standardized workflow and policy frameworks for support operations
• Designed automation- and AI-ready improvements to core support journeys
• Led alignment across CX, Operations, Engineering, QA, Security, and partner teams


⸻

Real-time Chat Journey Optimization

Led the initiative to resolve drop-off and re-entry issues in live chat flows by refining logic, user experience, and operational alignment.

Impact: Improved re-entry experience, reduced handling delays, and increased support-flow stability.

⸻

Teen Membership Funnel Optimization

Owned improvements to the membership discovery and entry funnel by refining exposure logic and aligning front/back-office policies.

Impact: Increased entry and revisit rates; reduced policy-related inconsistencies.

positions.title: Product Manager
positions.description:

Owned the end-to-end development of an LLM-powered chatbot designed to analyze candidate reputation and career-related data for enterprise hiring workflows.

Responsibilities
• Defined data structure, field rules, and preprocessing logic tailored for reputation/career signal extraction
• Designed prompt strategies and multi-step reasoning flows for structured insight generation
• Established evaluation criteria and ran systematic model-quality improvement loops
• Coordinated AI security, data privacy, and compliance considerations across stakeholders

Impact
• Enabled higher-quality career/reputation insights for enterprise clients
• Built a scalable foundation for future AI-driven hiring assessment modules

⸻

Operational Reporting Automation

Drove the redesign of large-scale reporting workflows, introducing automated generation to replace manual operations.

Impact: Reduced reporting lead time from ~100 hours to ~1 minute; significantly improved operational stability.

positions.title: Product Manager

• Defined core UX issues via research and behavioral data
• Designed home structure, navigation principles, and content exposure logic
• Coordinated prioritization across recommendation, advertising, and discovery modules
• Analyzed key performance metrics and iterated on improvements

Impact: Increased CTR, click depth, and saves; established a scalable structure for personalization.

⸻

Account/Data Integration Project

Owned the unification of account, policy, and data structures across Brandi and SeoulStore.

Responsibilities
• Consolidated membership, point, and privacy policy criteria
• Defined migration and merge logic for large-scale user data
• Aligned operations, business, legal, finance, and CX on unified standards
• Prepared user guides and FAQs

Impact: Achieved 76% active user integration; strengthened operational and data consistency.

Supported Amazon US growth by contributing to the design and operation of a Facebook Messenger chatbot MVP intended to improve social traffic conversion.

Responsibilities
• Conducted keyword analysis and competitive benchmarking to identify customer needs

Impact

headline: Regional Product Owner @ Xsolla
summary:
What makes my approach different: I don't just define requirements, I build solutions. I create n8n workflows that eliminate manual processes, use AI-assisted development for rapid prototyping, and leverage SQL analytics for data-driven decisions. Currently championing Claude AI adoption across my organization while driving sales pipeline growth for Korean and Japanese gaming publishers at Xsolla.
I believe the modern Product Owner is both strategist and builder—comfortable with automation, AI collaboration, and shipping code, not just shipping specs. Trilingual (Korean/English/Japanese) with a track record of making complex problems simple and scalable globally.

recommendations.recommendationText: Jongguk is highly motivated, reliable and pleasant to work with. He always completed projects in timely manner and brought creative ideas to drive better results. He soon became an expert in his area and helped other colleagues in APAC team. I strongly believe that Jongguk would be an excellent addition to any company, and I am confident that he would excel in his next professional challenge.

I was fortunate enough to work with Jongguk for just over a year and a half within the Google Play KR Games Merch team, a three-man team that strove to deliver the right games and contents to KR gamers. Within the ever changing KR gaming industry, Jongguk not only demonstrated that he could work in a fast paced working environment but has also displayed his meticulous prowess through stream lining and executing a long chain of operation to near perfection. If you're looking for a hero with an excellent operational mindset, I don't think I can come up with a better candidate.

recommendations.recommendationText:
애라님은 매사에 성실하고 묵묵히 맡은 바 책임을 다하는 분입니다:) 

당시 데이터사이언스 파트를 인솔하던 때에, 프로그래밍 교육 파트에 계셨음에도 데이터사이언스 분야에 대한 이해도가 매우 높아 두 분야가 접목된 기획을 임팩트 있게 뽑아냈으며 매출 성과로 증명하곤 했습니다.

특히 숫자에 기반한 시장조사 능력이 탁월했으며 SQL이나 클라우드 DB 관련하여 논의가 필요할 때 조직 내에서 가장 많이 의견을 주고 받았습니다. 

이외에도 맡은 분야에 대한 역량과 이해를 높이기 위해 항상 공부하고 노력하는 모습이 저를 포함한 다른 동료들에게도 귀감이 되었습니다. 

이렇게 언제나 믿고 의지할 수 있는 든든한 동료로서 애라님을 추천드립니다:)

headline: Product Manager
summary: 울산과학기술원에서 리서치 및 제품을 중심으로한 산업디자인을 전공한 뒤, 대학원에 진학하여 오브나우디자인 연구소에서 UX/UI를, 뉴디자인 스튜디오 연구소에서 서비스 및 정책 디자인을 연구하여 석사학위를 취득하였습니다. 졸업 후, 2년 간 릴리프마인드 팀에서 COO(운영총괄)로  ‘똑똑샘 홈티칭:  발달지연을 겪는 아동들이 가정에서 검증된 발달 치료사와 치료 프로그램을 경험할 수 있도록 제공하는 O2O 플랫폼’ 서비스를 운영하며 발달지연 아동들에게 약 5000건의 치료를 제공하였습니다. 제품 기획부터 출시, 운영, 세일즈, 개선까지의 제품 Lifecycle 전체를 총괄하였습니다. 창업 종료 후, 대전의 부동산 조각투자 서비스 회사인 루센트블록에 PM으로 입사하여 1년동안 코리빙, 코워킹 공간관리 SaaS 서비스, 콜리를 런칭시켰습니다. 현재는 부동산 조각투자 서비스 소유 팀으로 이동하여 서비스 운영 및 기업보안감사 및 기술개발팀 관리를 전담하고 있습니다.

headline: Digital Marketing & Market Analyst
summary:
I’m a data-driven growth marketer with hands-on experience managing and optimizing paid campaigns across Google, Meta, YouTube, and emerging platforms. I specialize in turning audience insights into acquisition strategies that building performance-focused funnels, improving campaign efficiency, and scaling ROI for global and SMB clients alike.

Whether I’m launching a contributor campaign on Google Ads, A/B testing creatives, or partnering with product and analytics teams, I’m always focused on measurable impact. My work has led to 40% increases in ROI, 18% reductions in CPA, and multi-channel strategies that connect the right message to the right audience, at the right time.

With a foundation in marketing analytics and product strategy, I thrive at the intersection of creative execution and performance data. I'm currently looking for opportunities to contribute to fast-moving, globally minded teams where paid acquisition, campaign experimentation, and process optimization are key to growth.

recommendations.recommendationText:
김태현님은 타 부서와 늘 세련된 커뮤니케이션으로 완벽한 의견조율을 하는 동시에 담당 프로젝트의 완성도를 위해 늘 학습하는, 책임감을 완벽히 갖춘 분입니다.

가상자산거래소인 GOPAX를 운영하는 (주)스트리미에서 비대면 고객주의의무(KYC) 프로세스를 구축하는 과정에서 협업을 하였습니다. 김태현님은 AML부서가 요구하는 업무요건을 바탕으로 개발부서가 이를 시스템화 하는 프로젝트 매니저로서, AML부서와 개발부서의 요구사항을 모두 이해하기 위해 늘 스스로 학습하는 동시에 양 부서간 의견을 현명하게 조율하였습니다.

그 결과, 강도높은 법규제를 충족하여 감독당국에서도 인정하는 동시에 고객편의성까지 모두 확보한 최고 수준의 비대면 고객확인 프로세스를 오픈 및 운영할 수 있었습니다.

이런 점을 비추어볼 때, 태현님은 앞으로도 어느 부서와 어느 업무로 협업을 하든 늘 세련된 커뮤니케이션을 하면서 높은 업무적 이해도를 바탕으로 완벽한 결과물을 도출하실 것이라 확신합니다.

김태현님은 책임감을 갖고 서비스와 프로젝트를 리딩하는 PO이자 기획자입니다. 
스트리미에서 김태현님과 GOPAX 서비스의 KYC 본인확인 제도 도입하는 업무를 맡아 진행했습니다.
시작 당시에 명확한 정책이 없이 계속 변하는 규정에 따라 기획, 디자인, 개발을 수시로 수정사항이 생겼던 프로젝트였습니다.

김태현님은 기획자로써 수정되는 내용을 빠르게 파악하고 정리하여 협업하는 부서에 전달해 주었고 개발 진행 중인 상태에서 불가피하게 수정이 들어가야 할 때도 능동적으로 예외 케이스 및 막혀있는 진입경로를 찾아내어 기한 내에 프로젝트를 마무리하는 데에 큰 도움을 주었습니다.
또한 PO로써 의사결정을 할 때 생길 수 있는 타 부서와의 의견 조율과 타 기관과의 소통에서도 훌륭한 커뮤니케이션 스킬을 보여주셨습니다.
약 2년간 함께 밀접하게 협업한 동료로써 김태현님은 다시 함께 일하고 싶은 역량을 갖춘 분입니다. 전체를 볼 줄 알고 꼼꼼한 정책을 만들 수 있는 기획자이며, 또 프로젝트에 대해 높은 책임감과 열정을 갖고 일을 끝까지 되게 만드는 디자인, 개발, QA까지의 업무 진행 과정에 대한 이해도가 높은 PO입니다.

김태현님은 높은 책임감과 주인의식을 갖춘 뛰어난 기획자입니다. 

스트리미 재직시 최장기 (약 1년 6개월) 그리고 최고난이도 프로젝트 (금융업의 비대면 본인인증)를 당시 시니어가 아님에도 불구하고 자진하여 맡아주셨고 기간내 완수하는 저력을 보여주셨습니다.  당시 약 15명의 동료 앱&웹 개발자/QA엔지니어/디자이너를 리드해주셨고, 자금세탁방지실/보안전략실 등 컴플라이언스 부서의 인풋을 열린마음으로 적극 수용하였습니다. 당국의 세세한 가이드가 부족했던 상황에서도 재량껏 고객입장에서의 편의성을 연구해가며 프로젝트를 훌륭히 마무리 해주셨습니다.  또한 문화가 다소 다른 타사와의 커뮤니케이션도 뛰어납니다.  고팍스 실명확인계좌 연동 프로젝트 담당자로써 제휴 은행의 실무진과도 원활한 소통으로 프로젝트를 성공리 마무리한 경험이 있습니다.

CPO로써 바라보는 김태현님은 어린나이에 비해 성숙한 커뮤니케이션 스킬을 가지고 있고 엄청한 책임감과 무리하고 어려운일을 도맡아하려고 있는 소위 '깡따구' 있는 대범한 기획자입니다.  특히 복잡하고 스케일이 큰 프로젝트에 욕심이 있으시고 이를 잘 수행해는 능력이 돋보이는 인재라고 평가합니다.

Emma and I developed the Gopax's new KYC process in order to conform to the government's new regulation, which we finally released on December 08, 2021. In the project, she did her best not only as an UI/UX product planner but also as a coordinator who deals with various points of view across teams. She is such an open-minded person who likes listening to different ideas and applies them quickly to Gopax. The project was a great journey and thanks for all the things you contributed.

positions.title: Product Manager
positions.description:
[Description]
MEDIT is a medical company with its essence in the dentistry field. It strives to make innovation for dental experts via providing IOS(Intra-Oral Scanner) along with a variety of applications that attempt to aid dental professionals in treating their patients. As Product Manager of MEDIT Apps team, I am in charge of integration projects between MEDIT platform and external software from various global companies and enhancing Medit native software to maximize the value we provide to our customers.

[Key Achievements]
- Led development of MEDIT's new product(Confidential) from scratch to internal launch
- Executed market research and analyzed user feedback and data to further enhance MEDIT native software using agile methodologies
- Led Medit Platform integrations with 3rd party software for in-bound and out-bound workflows including user management, data processing, and ordering by collaborating with both internal and external stakeholders

positions.title: Product Manager
positions.description:
[Description]
Flow is a SaaS-based PMS collaborative tool. With its essence in managing work based on a project level, it helps everyone to efficiently tackle work through various essential features such as project managements, chat, online-calls, OKR, etc. Currently, it provides services to over 450K+ people in 20+ countries.

[Key Achievements]
- Examined data integrity for key metrics for user and revenue (DAU, Daily new users, retention, conversion rate, etc.) and fixed incorrect data to conduct data analysis
- Established TMS(Task Management System) based on objectives and effectiveness measured in a quantitative scale by integrating user voice channels and backlog management measures
- Adopted documentation management system

positions.title: Product Manager
positions.description:
[Description]
HOOGi is a short-form video platform for product reviews. Encompassing both e-Commerce and contents, it attempts to help users to find the perfect product of their desire via video reviews and link them to the e-Commerce website with the lowest price. Therefore, users don't need to check on Youtube/TikTok/Instagram and go to Amazon/Google, but do all in HOOGi.

[Key Achievements]
- Led launch of HOOGi, a mobile platform application providing short form videos of product reviews and lead users to e-commerce channels to purchase the product
- Starting from market research, established BM and OKR, led product development for both mobile app(front-office) and web services(back-office), define data contents including log activities, and executed QA as well as operation
- Analyzed sign up process issues such as completion rate and lead time via Google Analytics and renovated the entire process to decrease sign-up lead time from 60+ to 9 seconds and improve completion rate from 70 to 97%
- Investigated SDK efficiency based on its cost and usage rate and optimized the cost for it by decreasing it by 98% ($3990 → $75 per 1mo) while providing identical features to users

headline: B2B SaaS Product Manager | Driving Growth with API Integration & Data-Driven Strategies | TAM & Technical Sales
summary:
[기술과 비즈니스를 연결하여 성과를 만드는 B2B SaaS PM]

3년 차 Product Manager로서, 기술적 솔루션을 통해 비즈니스의 병목 현상을 해결하고 운영 효율을 극대화하는 데 강점이 있습니다. 영업(Sales)과 기술지원(TAM)을 거치며 쌓은 '고객 중심 사고'와 '기술적 이해도'를 바탕으로, 실질적인 가치를 창출하는 프로덕트를 만듭니다.

Core Value & Strengths:
- Technical PM: 비즈니스 요구사항을 API 설계, 데이터 로직 등 기술적 스펙으로 구체화하고 개발팀과 긴밀히 협업합니다.
- Data-Driven Problem Solver: 로그 데이터(MongoDB/HTTP) 분석을 통해 문제의 원인을 집요하게 파악하고, 데이터 정합성을 확보합니다.
- Integration Specialist: Salesforce, Kakao 등 3rd Party 솔루션 연동을 주도하여 제품의 확장성을 높이고 신규 매출을 창출합니다.

Career Journey:
- E-commerce Sales & Operation (Sidam)
- ERP Solution Technical Sales (Doum ETS)
- Technical Account Manager & PM (MBI Solution)

현재는 실무 경험을 이론적으로 체계화하고(PM 부트캠프), 다양한 도메인 프로젝트를 수행하며 더 큰 도약을 준비하고 있습니다. 기술로 비즈니스의 한계를 넘어서는 여정에 기여하고 싶습니다.

educations.description: 제적

positions.title: 제품 매니저
positions.description:
B2B SaaS 챗봇 및 상담 솔루션 '해피톡'의 PM 및 초기 TAM 팀 리딩

[Key Achievements]
- 상담 이탈 방지 자동화 (Process Optimization): 웹 환경의 알림 부재로 인한 이탈 문제를 해결하기 위해 '알림톡 자동 발송' 프로세스 기획. 상담 시간 50% 단축 및 중단율 80% 감소 달성.
- 데이터 정합성 확보 (Data Integrity): 대용량 트래픽 환경(쿠팡이츠)에서 발생한 데이터 누락 이슈를 MongoDB 로그 분석을 통해 진단. 로직 개선을 통해 누락 '0건' 달성.
- Salesforce CRM 연동 (Technical Integration): 엔터프라이즈 고객을 위한 CRM 연동 API 설계 및 SSO 보안 인증 구축. 신규 매출 4,800만 원 창출.
- 고객 Self-Service 환경 구축: 챗봇 배포 오류 시 원인과 해결책을 안내하는 '진단 가이드' 기획 → 고객 문의 40% 감소.
- AI 챗봇 도입 (Digital Transformation): 4060 유저를 위한 Vector DB 기반 자연어 AI 챗봇 도입 → 전화 상담 50% 감소, 업셀링 매출 6,500만 원 달성.

positions.description:
포그리트는 글로벌 UX 데이터 분석 서비스인 뷰저블, 뷰저블리의 제작/운영사입니다. 
데이터를 기반으로 한 기업 UX 컨설팅과 함께, 분석 서비스의(뷰저블,뷰저블리) 개선 작업을 병행하였습니다.

■ 뷰저블, 뷰저블리 서비스 기획
- UX 데이터분석 툴 '뷰저블','뷰저블리' 서비스 UX 고도화

■ 뷰저블, 뷰저블리를 통한 고객사 UX/UI 분석 및 컨설팅

- 고객사 정성 리서치 설계 및 유저 인터뷰 진행

■ 그 외
- 뷰저블 인사이트 블로그 컨텐츠 작성
- 광고 크리에이티브 주차별 테스트 설계 및 기획

summary:
Emerging Markets Senior Product Planning and Product Manager with ~6 years of global experience in product planning, aftermarket sales, and strategic growth across emerging markets.

At HD Hyundai Infracore, manage PRM/NPD for 30T+ excavators, conduct benchmarking visits, and deliver dealer training in Türkiye; support business cases for cross-platform and mid-size equipment enhancements.

At HD Hyundai XiteSolution, served on the India Growth Strategy TF, designing a rebuild/used-equipment model that improved profitability and was adopted into India subsidiary operations.

At HD Hyundai Construction Equipment, led aftermarket sales in Russia, CIS, Türkiye, and Israel, including a $150M lubricant business launch in Russia (S-Grade Project, Core Talent recognition) and securing government export approvals for 40% of shipments to mitigate sanctions risk.

Recognized for cross-functional collaboration, cross-cultural agility, and data-driven decision-making, consistently aligning HQ, R&D, subsidiaries, and dealer networks toward sustainable growth.

educations.description:
• Completed IGCSE and International Baccalaureate Diploma at BIS Moscow
• Conducted 52 social engagement projects focused on community service, cultural engagement, and creative expression
• Participated in student-led environmental cleanup, peer tutoring, and international culture days
• Volunteered as multilingual interpreter (Korean–English–Russian) during school events
• Demonstrated leadership and initiative through organizing student clubs and charity campaigns
• Developed core competencies in global citizenship, intercultural collaboration, and ethical responsibility

• Participated in Kyung Hee Model United Nations (KIMUN) and WFUNA Advanced Training at UN Office in Geneva
• Gained practical exposure to multilateral diplomacy, sustainable development, and human rights frameworks
• Served as English–Russian–Korean interpreter during university’s Global Collaborative Program
• Engaged in academic research and analysis on international political economy
• Graduated with Magna Cum Laude; awarded for outstanding economics portfolio
• Developed strong intercultural communication, negotiation, and analytical skills

Modules included:
• Applied Economics – Analyzed inflation, taxation, and unemployment using statistical methods.
• Global Environment of Business – Studied globalization, trade theory, and institutional impacts on business strategy.
• Marketing Principles – Covered consumer behavior, segmentation, and the marketing mix through case-based learning.
Enhanced global business acumen, analytical thinking, and cross-cultural communication.

positions.description:

Leading benchmarking across Emerging Markets and cross-model analysis to identify competitive advantages and regional adpation needs, aligning regional product needs with global portfolio strategy.

Supporting new product launch training and technical education for global dealers across 4 continents(Africa / Eurasia  / Latin America / Oceania)

Driving business case development for cross-platform components and mid-size equipment enhancements, supporting investment decisions and long-term profitability.

Collaborating with HQ R&D and global sales planning teams to integrate VOC and market intelligence into lifecycle planning and pricing strategy.

Conducting Sales Pitching and handling VOCs from Asia, Africa, CIS, Russia, The Middle East, Oceania and Latin America.

• Hindistan genelinde pazar araştırmaları ve saha incelemeleri gerçekleştirdim; ikinci el ekipman ticareti için uçtan uca süreç modelleri tasarladım.
• Departmanlar arası iş geliştirme önerileri sundum ve bunları iş süreçlerine başarıyla entegre ettim.

positions.title: Senior Sales Account Manager
positions.description:
1) Küresel ticari ve siyasi krizlere karşı önlem olarak Rusya ve BDT'de öncü projelere liderlik
• Yenilikçi Rusya İş İnisiyatifi: Rusya’daki önemli bir müşteriye yönelik yeni uzun vadeli bir madeni yağ işi başlatarak küresel yaptırımların sınırlamalarına çözüm getiren yeni bir gelir kaynağı oluşturuldu. Bu iş operasyonu için HD Hyundai Oilbank ve GS Caltex ile tedarik anlaşmalarına varıldı. Proje kapsamında gerekli belgeler başarıyla hazırlanarak uygulamaya geçirildi. 2022 yılı boyunca toplam 150 milyon USD satış cirosu elde edildi. Bu başarı sonucunda şirket içi "S-Seviye" ödülüne layık görüldü ve kilit yetenek çalışanı olarak aday gösterildi. (※ Proje hâlen aktif olarak devam etmektedir.)
• Stratejik İhracat Yaptırımı Projesi: Rusya’ya yönelik ihracat yaptırımlarına karşı stratejik önlemler alınarak şirketin toplam ürünlerinin %40’ına kadar ticaret onayı başarıyla alındı. Bu sayede dış riskler en aza indirildi ve Rusya’daki iş hacmi güvence altına alındı. Ticaret, Sanayi ve Enerji Bakanlığı (MOTIE) ile şirketimiz arasındaki iş birliği ve karşılıklı anlayış seviyesi, başarılı iş toplantıları sayesinde ciddi şekilde artırıldı.

2) BDT, Hindistan ve Türkiye bölgelerinde yenilikçi satış ve stratejik gelişim projelerinin tasarlanması ve yönetilmesi
• Hindistan Stratejik Gelişim Görev Gücü: HD Hyundai Construction Equipment India’nın AMPS (Aftermarket Yedek Parça ve Ürün Servisi) iş kolunu güçlendirmek amacıyla görev gücü üyesi olarak görev aldı. Hindistan genelinde saha araştırmaları gerçekleştirilerek iş modeli geliştirildi ve kullanılmış iş makineleri ticareti süreci için genel bir yol haritası başarıyla çizildi.
• Yeni Kilit Müşteri Geliştirme: Kazakistan'daki yeni bir müşteriyle LOI (niyet mektubu) anlaşması yapıldı ve bayilik konusunda mutabakata varıldı. Sürecin en başından itibaren, ERP sistemine müşteri bilgileri girildi, yedek parça tedariki için belgeler hazırlandı ve şirket içindeki ilgili departmanlarla aktif iş birliği sağlandı.

recommendations.recommendationText: I had the pleasure of working with Sungbeom Mo on Hyundai’s India Growth Strategy TF. He brings a rare mix of strategic thinking, field execution, and cross-cultural communication. Sungbeom led key projects with clarity, empathy, and data-driven insight—especially in Türkiye, India, and CIS regions. His global mindset, multilingual skills, and purpose-driven approach make him a great fit for any international or mission-focused organization.

Sungbeom is a globally minded and highly professional individual with strong alignment to the core competencies sought by international organizations.

He demonstrates integrity, accountability, and excellent cross-cultural communication. His success in managing strategic partnerships and leading initiatives across Türkiye, India, Russia, and the CIS reflects his client-oriented approach and adaptability in diverse settings.

Sungbeom stands out for his collaborative spirit and ability to deliver results within multicultural teams. His respect for diversity, commitment to learning, and passion for impactful work make him an excellent fit for roles in NGOs, international institutions, or multilateral agencies.

I’m confident he will contribute meaningfully to any organization driving global cooperation and sustainable change.

headline: 🎮 6년차 게임 산업 전문가 | 사업 기획 및 개발| 현지화 | 커뮤니티 빌딩 | 게임 기획 및 프로덕트 매니지먼트(PM) | 글로벌 유저와의 브릿지 역할🌏
summary:
🎮 툼 레이더에서 시작된 여정, 한국 게임 산업 속 나의 이야기 🎮

첫 액션 게임은 툼 레이더였고, 2004년 처음 MMORPG를 선택할 때 월드 오브 워크래프트(와우) 와 에버퀘스트 2 사이에서 고민하다가 결국 *리니지 2(PC)*를 선택했습니다. 그 선택을 계기로 게임뿐만 아니라 한국에 대한 관심도 생기겼습니다. 

2014년 유학생으로 한국에 오게 되었고, 이후 자연스럽게 한국 게임 업계에서 커리어를 시작하게 되었습니다. 제가 사랑하는 게임, 그리고 좋아하는 한국에서 일할 수 있다면 더 의미 있는 삶이 될 거라 믿었습니다.

물론 쉽지 않은 길이었고, 많은 어려움도 있었지만 여전히 게임에 대한 열정, 한국에 대한 애정, 그리고 한국 게임 산업이 더 큰 무대로 나아갈 수 있다는 희망을 품고 있습니다.

이제 대한민국 연주자로 그런 긍정적인 마음으로, 앞으로도 저의 한국 생활과 게임 업계에서의 여정은 계속될 것입니다.

recommendations.recommendationText:

And he always thinks about how to make a good direction for Project.
I was happy working with him.

Thanks to his support, we could meet so many influential streamers on our business trip to TwitchCon in San Diego successfully achieving our goals during the event. Also he is a gentleman with a good manner, personality and cares about other people working with him. He knows how to make the best communication with streamers, users and colleagues. He is a very talented writer as well. It was my pleasure to work with him at my previous company.

Ariel is the product visionary and leader that every organization should stive to find. He has the ability to inspire and create shared vision through his empathy, partnerships and genuine personal connections. recommendations.recommendationText:
I had the privilege of working with Suyeon when she interned with the Gucci eBusiness team. I had the opportunity to recruit her during the interview process. My experience working with Suyeon was extremely positive. Despite being a junior, she demonstrated a high level of professionalism and consistently completed her tasks efficiently. I could always trust her to handle her responsibilities. 

Moreover, Suyeon maintained a positive attitude, which allowed her to work well with the team and significantly contributed to a positive team atmosphere. Suyeon has built her e-commerce experience at Gucci and has since expanded her career to include marketing and merchandising.

I was so impressed with her performance and work ethic that I would be thrilled to have the opportunity to work with Suyeon again in the future. Any organization would benefit greatly from having Suyeon as part of their team.

headline: Global Brand Manager, Lemonderma, VDVIA | K-Beauty Strategy & Global Sales | Ex-HYBE AI PM & Startup Founder
summary:
"Tech-Savvy Senior Brand Manager: Scaling Brands with Data-Driven Marketing & AI"

I specialize in scaling brands globally by combining deep industry knowledge with smart data strategies. Currently, I lead the global expansion of the K-Beauty brand, Lemon Derma, at VDVIA.

My professional background allows me to approach global business with a unique perspective:

1. AI & Data Competence: Leveraging my experience as an AI PM at HYBE (Supertone) and as a Certified Search Advertisement Marketer, I utilize AI tools and ad-tech to optimize market entry strategies and maximize brand visibility.

2. Execution & Growth: I have a strong track record of "0-to-1" growth. Most notably, I successfully acquired 100,000 active users in just 6 weeks for an AI service through data-driven performance marketing. I enjoy solving complex challenges and building sustainable systems for rapid growth.

3. Global Partnership: I am dedicated to building long-term relationships. I believe in growing together by providing not just products, but also the marketing insights and assets needed to succeed in local markets.

I always welcome networking with anyone who has deep insights to share. If you are interested in discussing brand growth or market innovations, let's connect.

positions.title: Senior Global Brand Manager
positions.description:
"Recruited to transform existing brand operations into a data-driven strategic growth model, integrating AI efficiency and consumer-centric analytics."

Spearheading Data-Driven Strategic Transformation Leading the modernization of global brand management systems by shifting from intuitive decision-making to a data-backed strategy. Currently establishing a robust framework to analyze market metrics and consumer insights, ensuring accurate forecasting and targeted global expansion.

Initiating AI & Tech-Enabled Workflow Embedding Generative AI and digital tools into the core marketing value chain to upgrade operational standards. Developing protocols that leverage technology for market analysis and content creation, aiming to maximize agility and output quality across the organization.

Designing a Consumer-Centric Growth Ecosystem Restructuring the marketing approach to align with direct consumer needs. Building a systematic B2C engagement playbook based on customer data analysis, laying the groundwork to drive sustainable demand and accelerate partner performance.

positions.title: AI Product Manager
positions.description:
"Led product growth and creator ecosystem for an AI audio platform, achieving 100k+ users in 6 weeks through data-driven performance marketing and automated workflows."

Explosive User Acquisition & Performance Marketing 
Executed a high-efficiency Google Ads strategy, acquiring 100,000 new users within just 6 weeks of launch. Achieved a 590% increase in Conversion Rate (CVR) while reducing Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) by 87.5%. Recognized as a Google Ads Success Case for exceptional performance optimization and obtained Search Ads Marketer Level 1 certification.

Building Creator Ecosystem & Viral Growth 
Designed and managed a Global Ambassador Program with 350 creators. In the first 30 days, the program generated 2,000+ AI-produced videos, amassing over 20 million views, successfully validating Product-Market Fit (PMF) and driving organic viral loops.

AI Process Automation & SEO Dominance 
Built an automated SEO content pipeline using AI tools, cutting production time by 70%. Published 34 blog posts in 6 weeks, skyrocketing average search ranking from 34th to 8th and increasing impression volume by 167%.

Global Partnerships & Brand Engagement 
Organized 5 major AI video contests (2 global, 3 internal) in partnership with top-tier companies in the US, China, and Japan. Secured 579 high-quality video references to strengthen the AI database and elevated global brand awareness.

Thought Leadership & AI Expertise 
Established a personal AI tech channel (Threads) to share insights, gaining 15k followers and 1M+ views in just 7 weeks. Continually invested in mastering emerging AI tools, translating technical expertise into actionable business growth strategies.

positions.title: Founder & CEO
positions.description:
"Founded and led a wellness startup, successfully pivoting business models based on market data and securing strategic partnerships."

Community Building & Market Validation
Managed a wellness lifestyle community of 1,000+ members in the metropolitan area to identify core market needs. Formed and led a lean team of four, conducting user interviews and developing an initial MVP to validate demand for holistic group wellness programs.

Strategic Pivot & Business Modeling
Analyzed market data revealing an 82% failure rate among traditional fitness centers and saturation in the MZ demographic. Successfully pivoted the business model to target an underserved niche (women in their 40s-50s), developing a specialized B2B2C wellness solution for fitness facilities.

Agile Product Iteration & Partnership (MOU)
Executed 10+ rapid MVP iterations based on feedback from 50 in-depth user interviews. Secured a strategic MOU with MK Fitness (a mega-scale 35,000 sq. ft. facility in Gangnam) to pilot the program, proving operational viability.

Targeted Marketing & Fundraising
Devised channel-specific marketing strategies tailored to the 40-50s wellness demographic, successfully acquiring paid customers. Recognized for business potential, winning multiple government startup support programs and securing approx. $20K in seed funding and office space.

positions.title: Wellness Product Manager
positions.description:
Instructor Ecosystem & Wellness Content Strategy
Optimized a robust ecosystem of 300+ sports instructors and 500+ classes, focusing on identifying high-potential talent and architecting differentiated wellness content tailored to market needs.

Premium Content Development & Star Scouting
Leveraged competitor analysis and market insights to scout elite national athletes (e.g., Jain Kim, Jung-keun Bong). Produced 12 premium event VOD series, positioning the brand as a leader in high-end sports/wellness content.

B2B2C Expansion & Strategic Partnerships
Drove offline-to-online (O2O) synergy by conducting direct sales outreach to 60 sports facilities. Successfully secured MOUs with 20 key locations, building a scalable B2B2C network to accelerate online class adoption.

Product Market Fit & Revenue Growth
Validated Product-Market Fit (PMF) through high-impact launches; achieved a 15-second sell-out for Jain Kim’s offline masterclass and generated $15,000+ (₩20M) in revenue within the first month of the online course launch.

projects.description:
The Harvard College in Asia Program (HCAP) is a conference designed to foster mutual understanding and engagement between students from Harvard University and universities across Asia through academic and cultural exchange. As the largest Asia-focused exchange initiative at Harvard, HCAP aims to nurture the next generation of global leaders and strengthen international relations, providing participants with opportunities for self-development and exploration.

The 2017 HCAP Conference, held under the theme *"Redefining Leadership: Initiative and Influence in the Modern World,"* took place over two weeks—one in Boston and one in Seoul. As a member of the Seoul Team's Student Support Unit, responsibilities included planning and executing the overall events and cultural exploration activities. Additionally, full logistical support was provided for the Harvard participants during their stay in Seoul, including arranging accommodations, coordinating meals, and guiding them throughout their visit.
projects.title: 2017 HCAP Conference_Haravard College in Asia Program

recommendations.recommendationText: As a colleague project manager, Jacob(Sooseung) has shown a very inspiring manner of communication and risk managing skills. While we worked together on a particular NFT marketplace project, he has always supported and orchestrated the team in a honest and persuasive way, even though we were going through rough time dealing with tight deadlines. He knows how to handle and manage a lot of backlogs, tight schedules and real-time urgent communication within the team. Therefore I strongly recommend you to work with him, which will certainly lead you to have a great and positive experience.

Sooseung and I were together at U of T ; his high English level coupled with his abilities to handle a wide array of situations made him a great and enjoyable person to work with! Furthermore, his communication skills led to a nice, balanced atmosphere in the group. Sooseung will undoubtedly be a great addition to any position!

Sooseung was a great teammate to work with. He knew how to handle all the details that should be worked on and this helped our team to come up with original ideas. On top of that, he excelled in communicating with every team member and showed strong leadership which was extremely helpful when finalizing our tasks on time. I am certain that he will be a great addition to any position.

Sooseung was a clever student with his positive spirit and flexibility. He presented lots of creative ideas and carried out work with his sense of responsibility as we executed a group work. Also, he could make our project end successfully with his wit and competent presentation skill. His powerful strengths are conversation and sociability that could make him lead everything possible.

SooSeung and I worked in same group for several times during the study in ELP, which was nice and amazing.
He was an easygoing person, who could always manage the disagreements among group members. Also his English was fluent and accurate, which made me easy to understand. I would finally recommend his preparation for coming work, which was always on time and sufficient.
He has an impressive English skills, also team management skills. Especially, he knows very well how can manage team effectively. I really respect his skills.

He is a people person. He is good at making connection with other people. 
He has lots of teamwork experiences such as a student president of GeumGang University.
He is a perfect person to work in various group.

headline: Virbac Korea Product Manager
summary:
Product Manager | Virbac Korea | Practical Solutions for Veterinary Success

As a Product Manager at Virbac Korea, I bridge product innovation with real-world application, ensuring our veterinary products bring value to professionals and their clients. My focus is on empowering veterinarians with effective, practical solutions that make a meaningful impact on animal health.

positions.title: TF team Leader
positions.description:
Jul 2025 – Dec 2025

Following a challenging first half of the year, a Task Force team was established with a clear mandate to secure achievement of the 2025 annual budget. I served as TF Team Leader, leading execution during this critical period.

Through precise planning, scenario-based decision making, and effective negotiation with key stakeholders, I set clear execution priorities under constrained timelines and resources.
These efforts resulted in the successful achievement of the 2025 budget target.

A critical success factor was the integration and alignment of multiple teams with different goals and perspectives, bringing them together around a single direction and shared objectives.

Key strengths demonstrated:
	•	Structured planning and scenario-based strategy
	•	Negotiation that translates strategy into executable actions
	•	Cross-functional integration and alignment
	•	Strong execution that turns plans into measurable results

This experience reinforced a core belief:
In challenging environments, results are driven by execution.

positions.title: Project Manager – Government Vaccine Procurement (LSD)
positions.description:
Project Manager – Government Vaccine Procurement (Lumpy Skin Disease)

Oct 2023 – Feb 2024

Following the outbreak of Lumpy Skin Disease (LSD) in Korea in October 2023,
I led a government vaccine procurement project aimed at securing stable supply for the 2024 national vaccination program.

I served as Project Manager, overseeing the project from initial planning through bid execution.
My responsibilities included structuring the overall procurement strategy, leading negotiations with overseas vaccine manufacturers, and ensuring supply feasibility under government requirements.

Through close coordination with global suppliers, I secured advance supply readiness for 4,350,000 doses of LSD vaccine.
In parallel, I designed the full execution framework, covering delivery schedules, Certificates of Analysis (CoA), cold-chain logistics, and regulatory compliance required for government procurement.

The project involved an overall scale of approximately KRW 12 billion, with the LSD vaccine component valued at KRW 9.6 billion.
The government bid was formally submitted in February 2024, following several months of structured preparation and risk assessment.

While the final award was determined in accordance with public procurement regulations,
all pre-bid planning, supplier negotiation, and supply-chain structuring were led by me, ensuring the bid was executable, compliant, and realistic under tight timelines.

This experience strengthened my ability to manage complex government projects, translate uncertainty into actionable plans, and lead cross-functional execution in a highly regulated and time-sensitive environment.

Key strengths demonstrated:
• Structured project planning and execution
• Government procurement and tender strategy
• Supplier negotiation and risk management
• Vaccine SCM and cold-chain coordination
• End-to-end project ownership

headline: Kakao Product Manager
summary:
Product Manager with 5 years of experience building and scaling digital products through data-driven decision making, with recent experience driving an AI-powered product initiative

As a product manager at Kakao, I drove the growth of the business platform's support chat product by improving the overall experience for both business partners and end customers.

I owned the product development of Kanana Chat Assistant, an AI-powered chat management solution, spanning product strategy, feature definition and iterative validation. 
I designed key product features such as a human-in-the-loop consultation chat experience, guided model improvement direction, and validated product-market fit through closed beta testing with partners.

I also launched a new consumer mini-game service in KakaoTalk. I defined core metrics, designed game scenarios and recommendation logic, and drove product growth through A/B testing and data analysis.

Across my work, I have managed products for web and app environment, serving both end users and business partners, and collaborating closely with engineers, designers, data scientists, and other business stakeholders. I am interested in building AI SaaS products that improve productivity at scale

recommendations.recommendationText: It was a big pleasure to work with Farhan!!! His consistent positivity and relentless pursuit of solutions, even in challenging situations, were truly inspirational. Farhan's deep care and enthusiasm for our product were evident in every aspect of his work, reflecting a remarkable commitment to excellence. I truly enjoyed our meetings and collaborations with Farhan; his presence and input always added significant value to our work. Thank you for your smiles and warm vibes that brightened our workplace! :)

Farhan was a very capable, responsive and considerate problem solver, building and repairing several elements of the platform with limited support. He showed a willingness to take on difficult deadlines and tasks and solve issues as they arose with a consistent positive attitude.

Farhan has been an exceptionally resourceful and hardworking! He wears multiple hats in Tackle and adeptly helps with customer success, growth, business operations, marketing, QA and product. He is the most amiable and amazing team member who goes above and beyond to help and enable others. He has great communication and collaboration skills, that make him likable by both customers and teammates.
Farhan is also a quick learner and has been very agile in adapting to different tasks and trends in a fast-paced startup environment. Overall, he has been contributing immensely to different departments in Tackle and I wish him the very best in all his endeavors.

Mr. Farhan Kabir is a very hardworking, energetic, dedicated, enthusiastic and gentle person. He is someone who loves to take things positively! A good resource for any team. It was my pleasure to work with him !

educations.description:

내용 : 플라즈몬 효과를 활용하여 효율적인 얇은 광흡수층 제작을 통해 광음향 원리를 이용한 고주파수의 초음파를 발생시키는 소자를 제작 평가함. 기존 피에조 발진기에 비해 소형화 및 고주파 발진이 용이하여 초음파 이미징에 이용할 경우, 장비의 크기를 내시경에 적용 가능하도록 소형화가 가능하며 고주파를 통한 고해상도 이미징이 가능해줌

활용 기술 : MEMS공정, 펨토초레이저, LABVIEW, FDTD, MATLAB

headline: UWAY Co., Ltd. Product Manager
summary: 서비스 기획자이자 Product Owner로서 개발·기획·운영 전반을 경험하며, 문제를 아이디어가 아닌 실행 가능한 구조와 기준으로 전환하는 역량을 갖추고 있습니다. 제한된 리소스 환경에서 목표와 우선순위를 명확히 설정하고, 데이터와 현장 피드백을 기반으로 실행–검증–개선을 반복해 왔습니다. 다양한 이해관계자를 조율하며 의사결정을 이끌어 온 경험을 바탕으로, 서비스의 지속적인 개선과 조직의 학습을 가능하게 하는 기획을 지향합니다.

positions.title: Product Manager
positions.description:
- 유웨이 내 학생 대상 커머스 서비스 ‘유마켓’의 전반적인 기획 및 운영을 단독으로 담당
- 서비스 목표 수립부터 실제 운영, 개선까지 전 과정을 End-to-End로 책임

[담당 업무 및 역할]

- 서비스 및 사업 기획
　- 유마켓의 비즈니스 구조 및 운영 정책 기획
　- 중·고등학생 및 대학생을 주요 타깃으로 상품 구성, 가격 정책, 이벤트 전략 수립
　- 신학기 이벤트, 시즌성 할인, 럭키드로우 등 신규 이벤트 및 프로모션 기획 및 실행

- 운영 및 프로젝트 관리
　- 유마켓 일상 운영 전반 관리 (상품 운영, 이벤트 운영, 고객 문의 및 이슈 대응)
　- 마케팅, 개발, 디자인 등 내부 유관 부서 및 외부 파트너와 협업
　- 실행 일정 및 업무 우선순위 조율
　- 제한된 인력·리소스 환경에서 업무 중요도에 따른 우선순위 설정 및 실행

- 데이터 기반 운영 개선
　- 사용자 유입, 구매 전환, 이벤트 성과 등 운영 지표 기반 개선 포인트 도출
　- 이벤트 성과 분석을 통해 효과가 낮은 운영 방식은 축소 또는 중단, 성과가 높은 방식은 확대
　- 데이터와 현장 피드백을 바탕으로 서비스 운영 방식 지속 개선

- 정책 및 프로세스 정비
　- 쿠폰, 할인, 적립금 등 서비스 정책 정비 및 운영 기준 수립
　- 반복 업무 및 운영 혼선 최소화를 위한 내부 운영 프로세스 정리
　- 신규 기능 또는 운영 정책 도입 시 사용자 혼선 최소화를 위한 가이드 마련

- 사용자 경험(UX) 관점 개선
　- 고객 문의 및 VOC 분석을 통해 구매·이용 과정의 불편 요소 파악
　- 개발 및 디자인 부서와 협업하여 UX 개선 사항 기획 및 반영
　- 실제 사용자 행동과 현장 피드백을 기반으로 한 실행 중심의 개선 경험

- 제품 및 서비스 기획
　- 병원 현장을 기반으로 한 디지털 헬스케어 서비스 구조 기획
　- 사용자(의료진, 병원 관계자) 요구사항 분석 및 기능 정의
　- 경쟁 서비스 및 유사 솔루션 분석을 통한 제품 방향성 도출

- 프로젝트 및 협업 관리
　- 개발자, 디자이너, 병원 관계자 등 다양한 이해관계자와 협업
　- 기능 개발 일정 관리 및 우선순위 설정
　- 제품 이슈 및 개선 사항에 대한 커뮤니케이션 주도

- 운영 정책 및 프로세스 구축
　- 서비스 운영 정책 및 내부 업무 프로세스 수립
　- 이슈 및 VOC 관리 프로세스 정비
　- 제품 테스트 및 검증을 위한 문서 체계 구축

- 의료기기 및 품질 관련 업무
　- 소프트웨어 의료기기 인증을 위한 준비 및 관련 문서 관리
　- GMP 인증 과정에서 제품 및 개발 프로세스 정비에 기여
　- 제품 안정성과 신뢰성 확보를 위한 내부 기준 마련

　- 명상, 이완 훈련 등 치료 보조 콘텐츠 기획

　- 사용자 행동 로그 및 오류 데이터를 기반으로 개선 포인트 도출
　- 서비스 이용 패턴 분석을 통한 기능 개선 및 운영 방향 조정
　- 데이터 기반으로 사용자 이탈 및 불편 요소 최소화

　- 국내 디지털 치료제 승인 획득 과정에 기여

- 협업 및 커뮤니케이션

headline: Product Manager
summary:
I’m a product manager who has worked across product, engineering, operations, and business, mostly focused on building consumer and merchant-facing products from the ground up and scaling them in the real world.

Over the years, I’ve worked in mobility, local commerce, ordering, payments, and offline POS environments. I’ve led both 0-to-1 launches and scale-up projects in large platforms as well as early-stage teams, and have been involved in products used by millions of users. I usually work very closely with engineers, designers, sales teams, and external partners, especially when things are still messy and undefined.

In my previous roles

1. Launched new products at SOCAR, including accommodation booking and KTX reservations, and worked on cross-selling and GMV growth within the mobility platform

2. Built pickup and offline ordering products from scratch at Daangn Market, forming a small task force and taking the service through OBT with enterprise brands

3. Owned the full product scope at TimeOrder, from mobile ordering and POS/kiosks to PG/VAN integrations, settlement, and merchant back-office tools

4. Started and grew consumer products as a founder, raising government and private funding and handling everything from product and business strategy to investor communication

I’m most comfortable in early-stage or ambiguous environments, where there’s no clear answer yet. I like talking directly to users, testing assumptions quickly, and turning rough ideas into something that actually works. Having been involved in the entire lifecycle—from PRDs and launches to operations and monetization—I tend to care a lot about whether a product is not just interesting, but practical and sustainable.

I’m especially interested in problems around offline commerce, payments, and merchant tools, where product decisions show up immediately in day-to-day operations.

recommendations.recommendationText:
에이버리는 에이슬립에서 유일하게 포트폴리오 블라인드 투표를 통해 상당한 경력을 가진 후보님을 압도적 표 차이로 이기고 합격하셨습니다.
다소 생소하며 어려운 주제인 디지털 치료제의 사전 조사 자료의 수준이 상당했던것은 물론이고 시각적으로 '디지털 치료제'임을 잊을정도로 유려하고 예쁜 디자인이 사무실 내의 많은 동료들의 걸음을 투표지 앞에 멈춰서게 했던 기억이 납니다.
디지털 치료체 프로젝트인 솜마인드 스쿼드에서 환자들의 불면증을 치료로 이끄는 어려운 메시징을 디자인을 통해 아주 잘 녹여주었고 임상시험을 계속 할수있는 조건이었다면 UI UX의 높은 수준이 성공으로 이끌었다고 생각해도 과언이 아니라고 확신합니다.
또한 블로그 성격의 에이슬립 피드 라는 스쿼드에서는 PD 뿐만 아니라 PM 역할까지 훌륭하게 소화해 내어 개발 직군과 비개발 직군에서 종종 생기는 마찰을 완충시켜주어 멤버들이 짧은 기간동안 더 많은 일을 해낼 수 있도록 최고의 조율자가 되어 주셨습니다.
기회가 된다면 언젠가 꼭 다시 같은 회사에서 같은 프로젝트를 진행해보고싶은 좋은 동료입니다.

headline: Brand Manager at Bayer
summary:
Versatile and results-driven Global Brand & Product Manager with 10 years of experience spanning commercial and pharmaceutical industries. 
Expertise in strategic marketing, product lifecycle management, and international partnerships, having worked with leading global companies such as Danone and Sanofi.

positions.title: Product Manager
positions.description:
Handok Pharmaceuticals Co. (Nov 2020~)
Brand/Product Manager, Marketing Team

A strategic and results-driven Product & Brand Manager with a strong background in OTC, Medical Nutrition (FSMP), and ETC (CNS, CV). Proven expertise in brand management, product launches, sales optimization, and multi-channel marketing strategies.

• Brand & Product Management
-Led the branding and strategic marketing of OTC & FSMP (Food for Special Medical Purpose) in collaboration with Danone Nutricia. Managed ETC (CNS & CV) portfolios, driving market share and optimizing product positioning.
-Successful Product Launches: Spearheaded the launch of Aprovasc (Irbesartan-Amlodipine), Korea’s first combination antihypertensive, in collaboration with Sanofi, achieving strong market penetration and recognition.

• Sales & Business Growth
-Managed Nutricia portfolio (6B KRW annually) and key Sanofi co-promoted brands (Aprovasc, Stilnox, Aprovel, CoAprovel), achieving combined annual revenue of ~40B KRW.

• Market & Competitive Intelligence
-Conducted data-driven market analysis using UBIST, N-DDD, and NEWSTAR, tracking prescription trends, competitive dynamics, and product uptake.

• Marketing Strategy & Campaigns
-Developed and executed multi-channel campaigns, including digital marketing (Coupang, Naver), influencer collaborations, PR, and disease awareness initiatives.

• HCP Engagement & Sales Force Training
-Designed and executed training programs for Medical Representatives (MRs), including objection handling, key message reinforcement, and KOL engagement. 

• Cross-functional & Global Collaboration
-Partnered with Sanofi & Danone Nutricia in co-promotions, joint business reviews, and strategic discussions to expand portfolio and market reach. 
-Worked closely with sales, regulatory, medical, BD, and e-commerce teams to align brand strategy.

positions.title: Brand Manager
positions.description:
• New Sourcing & Exclusive Distribution
-Led the sourcing and launch of global brands across multiple categories, including baby care, organic apparel, and high-end boutique brands from the U.S., Israel, France, and Japan.
-Managed the entire import process, from safety testing (KATRI/KOTITI/KCL) to 4P analysis, price simulation, forecasting, purchase orders, and customs clearance.
Handled product coding and inventory management via SAP, ensuring seamless brand integration and operational efficiency.

• Revenue & Product Management
-Developed pricing strategies across internet and retail channels, optimizing profitability while maintaining competitive positioning.
-Conducted SKU reorganization, managing product lifecycle, concept development, and new product launches to streamline portfolio efficiency.
-Drove revenue growth by analyzing sales performance and planning promotional events in collaboration with cross-functional teams.

• Sales & Channel Expansion
-Expanded distribution channels, successfully launching brands in E-Mart, Olive Young, Gymboree, and online marketplaces.
-Designed and executed sales activation strategies, strengthening brand presence across department stores, supermarkets, drugstores, e-commerce, and B2B channels.

• Cross-functional & Global Collaboration
-Built and maintained strong relationships with global partners, handling daily communication, contract negotiations, and business meetings.
-Led international business trips and collaborated closely with overseas contractors, ensuring smooth import and distribution processes.

호기심, 창의력, 그리고 집요함을 바탕으로 0 to 1 부터 1 to 10까지의 프로덕트 개발에 강점을 가진 프로덕트 매니저입니다. 도메인에 구애 받지 않으며, 동료들과 시너지를 내어 어렵고 복잡한 문제를 해결하는 과정에서 가장 큰 성취를 느낍니다.

상황에 따라 유연하게 대처하고, 팀원들과의 원활한 소통을 통해 더 나은 방향을 함께 고민합니다. 사용자와 비즈니스 모두에게 의미 있는 제품을 만들기 위해 끊임없이 질문하고, 관찰하고, 배우고, 더 나은 선택을 찾으려는 열정이 있습니다.
